zh.lifeSummary: 當Evere Cameron於大約1415年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron26歲，母親Isabel Drummond26歲。她於大約1430年與Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於1510年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾德古爾享年96歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Evere Cameron于大约1415年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron26岁，母亲Isabel Drummond26岁。她于大约1430年与Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于1510年在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾德古爾享年96岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

en.Mull, Argyll, Scotland: Mull, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Evere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Evere Cameron was born about 1415, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, was 26 and her mother, Isabel Drummond, was 26. She married Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour about 1430, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died in 1510, in Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 96, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.Mull, Argyll, Scotland: Mull, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Evere Cameron est née environ 1415, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Drummond, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour environ 1430, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Ardgour, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 96 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.Mull, Argyll, Scotland: Mull, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Evere Cameron um 1415 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron 26 und ihre Mutter Isabel Drummond 26. Sie hat um 1430 in Scotland Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Evere Cameron è nata il circa 1415 nel Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabel Drummond, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour circa 1430, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1510, nel Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 96 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Evere Cameronが約1415年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameronは26歳，母Isabel Drummondは26歳であった。約1430年にスコットランドでDonald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は1510年にスコットランドアルグイルアルドゴウルで96歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Mull, Argyll, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 뮐
ko.lifeSummary: Evere Cameron(이)가 대략 1415년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Drummond(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1430년 스컷랜드에서 Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 스컷랜드 아그이 아지우르에서 96세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Evere Cameron nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Drummond, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour aproximadamente 1430, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1510, em Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland, com 96 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ro.Mull, Argyll, Scotland: Mull, Argyll and Bute, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.Mull, Argyll, Scotland: мулл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Evere Cameron родилась около 1415 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Drummond, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour около 1430 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности арджоур, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 96 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Evere Cameron nació aproximadamente 1415, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Drummond, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour aproximadamente 1430, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en 1510, en Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 96 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
